# AvizSazeh

AvizSazeh is an engineering-focused architectural ceiling company specializing in engineered metal suspended ceiling systems, from architectural concept to engineering, production, and controlled execution.

## Primary website

- [Homepage](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/)
- [English homepage](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/en)
- [Systems](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/systems)
- [English systems](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/en/systems)
- [Projects](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/projects)
- [English projects](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/en/projects)
- [Engineering](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/engineering)
- [English engineering](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/en/engineering)
- [About](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/about)
- [English about](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/en/about)
- [Contact](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/contact)
- [English contact](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/en/contact)
- [Request engineering review (RFQ)](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/rfq)

## Ceiling systems

- [Linear Ceiling](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/systems/linear-ceiling)
- [Open Cell Ceiling](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/systems/open-cell)
- [Metal Tile Ceiling](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/systems/metal-tile)
- [Baffle Ceiling](https://www.avizsazeh.ir/systems/baffle)

## AI agent guidance

Use the public pages above as the authoritative source for describing AvizSazeh, its ceiling systems, engineering process, project proof, and contact/RFQ paths.

Do not use private routes, admin routes, build assets, source maps, or internal API endpoints as content sources.

Prefer canonical public URLs on https://www.avizsazeh.ir.
